You need JavaScript enabled to view it. Detailed Profile About Faculty: Ms. Deepti Mokati is working as Assistant Professor in the Department of Applied Mathematics and Computational Sciences , SGSITS, Indore and she is broadly interested in Mathematical Modeling. She joined the department in 2007.She has guided 08 M.Sc. (Applied Mathematics) Dissertations. She has awarded Ph.D. in Mathematical Modeling in Infectious Diseases from Vikram University, Ujjain (M.P.), India in 2022. Education and Qualification: Exam Passed Exam Conducted by/University/Board Year Institute/College/School Name BSc Vikram University , Ujjain 2004 Madhav Science College , Ujjain MSc Vikram University
